evidence.clean_text: i. Use of religious, culture-specific and system-based terms and expressions: Emery (1989) and El-Farahaty (2015) argue that Arabic legal language takes many terms and expressions from the Islamic law which is derived from the Holy Quran and the Sunna (Prophet Muhammad’s deeds and utterances).
